_comment: NPC: Hong Die (红蝶). Canon ID: N57. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Hong Die

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Nascent Soul; complex relationship with Wang Lin

note: Heavenly Fate female disciple; complex relationship with Wang Lin

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: The Heavenly Fate Sect sees destiny in stars. I see it in fire. We disagree on methodology. We agree on results. My results are usually more convincing.
Wang Lin and I fought once. He won. I do not admit that to my sect. But I admit it to myself. A cultivator who cannot admit defeat cannot improve.
The Fighting Evil Sect calls us fortune tellers. They are wrong. We do not tell fortunes. We determine them. There is a difference.
Blaze rods and redstone. If you bring them, I will read your fate. Not the fate the stars show. The fate the fire shows. It is less accurate but more honest.

sect_tasks.name: Fire Fate Reading
sect_tasks.description: Hong Die reads your fate using fire for blaze rods and redstone.

sect_tasks.name: Combat Experience Exchange
sect_tasks.description: Hong Die trades her combat experience for jade slips and spirit stones.
